01

About

I'm a BBA graduate (GPA 3.93, Dean's List) and Nepal's national Class XII topper, preparing for an MS in Business Analytics. My favorite problems start messy and end in a clear, evidence-backed decision.

I lead marketing at NIMBUS, one of Nepal's top-25 corporates. I'm also entrepreneurial at heart — I co-founded a startup and founded a global youth chapter — and I care about using business and data to push society forward.

On the technical side, I've published research in behavioral finance and I'm building an analytics portfolio in Python, SQL, and Power BI.

At a glance

  • → Marketing lead at NIMBUS ($25M+ corporate)
  • → Behavioral finance & org-behavior research
  • → Python · SQL · scikit-learn
  • → Power BI · SPSS · SmartPLS
  • → Founder · social-impact builder
  • → Hult Prize · Harvard HPAIR ×2

03

Featured research

Peer-reviewed · First author · 2026

Big Five Personality Traits & Financial Risk Tolerance Among Nepalese Retail Investors

International Journal of Atharva, 4(2), 14–29 · with D. Basnet

First-authored study of 272 NEPSE retail investors — structured surveys analyzed in SPSS (regression explaining ~39% of variance) to test how personality shapes appetite for financial risk.

Openness ↑ risk Conscientiousness ↑ risk Extraversion ↑ risk Neuroticism ↓ risk Agreeableness · n.s.
Read the paper (DOI) →
04

Projects

// building in public — repos going live as I finish each one

Completed

Life Expectancy Prediction

End-to-end regression pipeline predicting life expectancy from health, economic, and demographic indicators. Covers data cleaning, EDA, outlier treatment, and encoding, with a trained Linear Regression model deployed via a saved model/encoder for live predictions.

Pythonpandasscikit-learnLinear Regression
Completed

Loan Default Prediction

Binary classification pipeline predicting loan default risk from applicant and credit data. Includes data cleaning, EDA, hypothesis testing (t-tests, chi-square), categorical encoding, and class-imbalance handling (SMOTE, oversampling) — comparing Logistic Regression and Random Forest models on accuracy, precision, and recall.

Pythonpandasscikit-learnimbalanced-learn
Completed

Voice Q&A Chatbot

A voice-driven chatbot that answers questions from a custom knowledge base using semantic search. Combines sentence embeddings (SentenceTransformer) with a FAISS similarity index to retrieve the best-matching answer, wrapped in a full speech-to-text → retrieval → text-to-speech pipeline.

PythonFAISSSentence TransformersSpeech Recognition
Completed

Animal Image Generator (DCGAN)

A deep convolutional GAN built from scratch in PyTorch to generate synthetic animal images. Includes a custom generator/discriminator architecture, training stabilization techniques (label smoothing, weight init, input noise), and a separate inference script to generate new images from the trained model.

PythonPyTorchDCGANComputer Vision
In progress

NEPSE Investor Risk Analysis

Turning my published research into code: exploratory analysis and a classifier predicting risk tolerance from personality traits.

Pythonpandasscikit-learn
In progress

Customer Churn Prediction

End-to-end supervised pipeline — EDA, feature engineering, and model evaluation to flag at-risk customers.

Pythonscikit-learn
